title: Particle Effect Document
description: A resource pack particle effect definition document for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. This describes the complete JSON file structure including format_version and the particle_effect wrapper. Particles use a component-based system with emitters controlling spawn rate and shape, and particle components controlling appearance and motion.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this particle effect file. Use '1.10.0' or later for the modern particle system.

particle_effect.title: Particle Effect
particle_effect.description: The particle effect definition containing description and components.

defaultSnippets.label: Particle Effect
defaultSnippets.description: Defines a particle effect that can be spawned by entities, blocks, or scripts. Particle effects use a component-based system with emitters (controlling spawn rate and shape), appearance (billboard rendering and colors), and motion (physics and collision).
